text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the spring Tenno Sho, the audience
is geared up to see Seiun Sky and Special Week
go head-to-head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky is unusually serious. Even when I
embarrass her with some supportive words, she
remains deep in thought.
